name: synology-apm-mcp
description: MCP server and workflow skills for Synology ActiveProtect Manager (APM). Exposes backup and restore operations, protection plans, M365, infrastructure, activities, and logs as MCP tools.

host.title: APM Host
host.description: Hostname or IP of your APM instance (e.g. apm.corp.com). Leave blank to use an existing CLI profile (APM_PROFILE).

no_verify_ssl.title: Skip SSL verification
no_verify_ssl.description: Enable for self-signed certificates. Not recommended for production.

mode.title: Operation mode
mode.description: Controls which tools are available: readonly (monitoring only), operator (backup/restore), manager (lock/unlock versions), admin (full CRUD). Default: operator.
